title: Learn Colors for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
TAP TAP! Benny points to RED and shouts HOORAY!
Learn colors for toddlers with red apples, yellow bananas, and green pears.
Preschool kids practice simple color words in a bright cartoon lesson.
Educational American English Short for ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
